levels.body: The line comprises a parallelism, meaning two clauses that correspond to each other in sense or construction (“parallelism, *n*.” 3.). In this line the parallelism establishes a direct comparison between the speaker’s thoughts and the stars. Like the stars, their thoughts appear one by one.
worksCited: "parallelism, *n*."*OED Online*, Oxford University Press, September 2021, www.oed.com/view/Entry/137469. Accessed 23 November 2021.

levels.body: The line specifies the connection between the speaker’s thoughts and the stars, and thereby emphasizes the connection between them. During the night-time the speaker escapes into an imaginative space, where she feels at peace and able to dwell in her dreams and experience inspiration (cf. Level 2 Interpretation [[divine]]). The parallelism illustrates that the freedom the speaker feels in letting her thoughts expand and roam freely emerges simultaneously with the stars.
